description: Southern Transcontinental Route Need Studied CAB Hears Pleas For Airline Link From Southeast To Calif WASHINGTON D C The Civil Aeronautics Board began hearings in Washington Tuesday to consider the need for a direct one carrier Southern Transcon tinental Route linking the prin cipal cities of the southeast with California The Citizens Wash ington Bureau reported The Washington hearing is the final stage of hearings consider ing location of the hotly con tested route Previous hearings were held in Los Angeles Hous toe and Miami Tuesdays hearings was con corned with the position of At1 lanta Georgia on the proposed route Georgia witnesses included Senator Herman Talmadge Rep reaentative James Davis of At laota Mayor William Hartsfield of Atlanta Secretary of State Ben Fortson and a group of Atlanta representatives Senator Herman Talmadge lead off witness before Hearing Ex aminer Edward T Stodola said the decision which the Board will render in this case will have a tremendous impact upon tfie economic future of Georgia and the Southeast It is my earnest hope that it will be a forward looking de cision which will stimulate rather than retard the present unpre cedented growth which is reshap ing the economy of
